# Archive Strategy Instruction

## Purpose
Enforces correct archiving of unused code and documentation. Ensures all deprecated or obsolete files are moved to the appropriate archive directories.

## Workflow
- Move unused code to `Archives/Archive_codes/`
- Move unused docs to `Archives/Archive_docs/`
- Move unused test-scripts to `Archives/Archive_tests/`
- Update `README.md` indexes in archive directories
- Avoid placing archives in any other location

## Scope
- Applies to all code and documentation in the workspace
- Must be followed for every archiving task

## Example Prompts
- "Archive unused code from content-service"
- "Move old docs to archive"
- "Update archive README after archiving"
